sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = toDate(now()) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date, toUnixTimestamp(event_date) AS timestamp FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, event_date, toDate(toUnixTimestamp(event_date) + 86400) AS next_day FROM test_dates;
